hero.title: Guhera ku gukenera kugera kuri repo rusange
hero.lead: IATF ifasha amashyirahamwe, amatsinda, n'abantu ku giti cyabo guhindura ibyifuzo nyabyo byo kuboneka mu mishinga rusange ifunguye.
support: Imishinga yemewe isohoka mu ishyirahamwe rya IATF GitHub munsi ya lisansi ya copyleft kandi iterwa imbere mu ruhame n'umwenjeniyeri ufite inshingano.

header.title: Inzira yoroheje rusange ya software iboneka

paragraphs: Binyuze muburyo, umuntu wese arashobora kohereza ikibazo cyo kugera kuri IATF. Niba itsinda rishobora kubyakira, ububiko rusange bwa GitHub burafunguwe kubikorwa.
Igishushanyo mbonera cyose cyemewe gifite inzu rusange igaragara ya code, ibibazo, inyandiko, no gusohora, hamwe niterambere riyobowe kumugaragaro ninjeniyeri ufite inshingano.

terms.definition: Ikibazo nyacyo cy'ubushobozi bwo kugera ku bantu
Gushyira mu bikorwa no gushyira mu bikorwa

header.title: Uko ikora
header.intro: Icyitegererezo kiguma ari gito ku bwende bityo inzira rusange ikaba yoroshye gukurikiza.

steps.title: Icyifuzo kiratangwa
paragraphs: Ishyirahamwe, itsinda cyangwa umuntu ku giti cye ashobora gutanga icyifuzo gishingiye ku bikenewe by'ukuri.
Ibyifuzo bishobora gutangirira ku rubuga rwa interineti, ukoresheje imeri kuri contact@iatf.cc, cyangwa binyuriye kuri Discord.

steps.title: IATF irabisuzuma
paragraphs: Turasuzuma niba igikorwa gihuje n'inshingano, niba ari ingirakamaro, n'uko igikorwa cyaba kiri mu mushinga w'isoko rusange ry'ikoranabuhanga.

steps.title: Hashyizweho ububiko rusange
paragraphs: Niba umushinga wemewe, ushyirwa ahagaragara mu ishyirahamwe rya IATF GitHub munsi ya lisansi ya copyleft.
Ububiko buba inzu rusange ya code, ibibazo, inyandiko, no gusohora.

steps.title: Umuhanga mu by'ubwubatsi ufite inshingano ni we uyobora uwo mushinga
paragraphs: Injeniyeri ushinzwe ishyirwa mu bubiko bw'umushinga kandi iterambere ribera mu ruhame.

header.title: Kugenzura ibikorwa biri gukorwa cyangwa gutangira umushinga wihariye

paragraphs: Koresha ububiko kugirango urebe ibyatangajwe n'abantu bose, cyangwa utangire gufata niba ikibazo cyihariye cyo kuboneka cyaba umushinga.
